# legendary-computing-machine Development Guidelines

Auto-generated from all feature plans. Last updated: 2025-10-29

## Active Technologies
- JavaScript ES6+ (no transpilation required, native browser support) + Phaser.js 3.80+ (game framework via CDN) (001-programmer-platformer)
- LocalStorage for high scores only (001-programmer-platformer)

- JavaScript ES6+ + Phaser.js 3 framework (WebGL/Canvas renderer, Arcade Physics) (001-programmer-platformer)

## Project Structure

```text
backend/
frontend/
tests/
```

## Commands

npm test; npm run lint

## Code Style

JavaScript ES6+: Follow standard conventions
Phaser.js 3: Use scene-based architecture, Arcade Physics for platformer mechanics

## Recent Changes
- 001-programmer-platformer: Added JavaScript ES6+ (no transpilation required, native browser support) + Phaser.js 3.80+ (game framework via CDN)

- 001-programmer-platformer: Constitution amended (v3.0.0) to allow Phaser.js framework
- 001-programmer-platformer: Updated technology stack from vanilla Canvas API to Phaser.js 3
